chapter_title.ar: باب التَّشَهُّدِ فِي الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ الْأَوَّلَتَيْنِ وَ الرَّابِعَةِ وَ التَّسْلِيمِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 30 –The performing of the Tashahhud (testimonies) during the first two Rak’at, and the fourth, and the greeting (Salām)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/164)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/164)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا جَلَسْتَ فِي الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ الْأَوَّلَتَيْنِ فَتَشَهَّدْتَ ثُمَّ قُمْتَ فَقُلْ بِحَوْلِ اللَّهِ وَ قُوتِهِ أَقُومُ وَ أَقْعُدُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Hareyz, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘Whenever you sit during the first two Rak’at, so you perform Tashahhud, then stand, so say, ‘By the Might of Allahazwj and Hisazwj Strength I am standing and sitting’.
en.sarwar: 11. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Hariz from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When you sit up straight after the first two Rak‘at, say Tashahhud (testimonies of belief), then when standing up say, “By the means of Allah and His power I stand up and sit down.’””
